case_title: MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC VS. BODY PROS PHYSICAL THERAPY INC., ET AL

docket_entries.description: COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 17176015) FILED BY PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT SOHN, YOSEF AN INDIVIDUAL $42,608.20 PRINCIPAL, $1,250.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $6,490.45 INTEREST, $2,600.00 COSTS, $1,196.22 ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS (PETITION TO CONFIRM), TOTAL JUDGMENT $54,144.87, SEE SCANNED DOC

DECLARATION OF MICHAEL R. BOULANGER IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COST (TRANSACTION ID # 17176015) FILED BY PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S MOTION FOR CONFIRMATION OF ARBITRATION AWARD, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO RESPONDENT YOSEF SOHN AND DENIED AS TO RESPONDENT BODY PROS PHYSICAL THERAPY, INC. A PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED AS TO MR. SOHN, BUT NOT AS TO BODY PROS. NO OPPOSITION FILED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND A PROPOSED JUDGMENT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: GORDON AIAVAO, CSR #11216, GAIAVAO@SFTC.ORG (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion Confirmation Of Arbitration Award And Requesting Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Aug-25-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC's Motion for Confirmation Of Arbitration Award And Requesting Attorney Fees And Costs

Petitioner Main Street Business Loans, LLC's motion for confirmation of arbitration award is granted as to respondent Yosef Sohn and denied as to respondent Body Pros Physical Therapy, Inc. A proof of service was filed as to Mr. Sohn, but not as to Body Pros. No opposition filed. Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and a proposed judgment. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR #11216, gaiavao@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/HK)
